Are you sure you want to delete this rec: Are you sure you want to delete this recipe? It will also be removed from any meal diary entries.
You must be at least 13 years old to use: You must be at least 13 years old to use Meal Diary.
You must accept the terms of service and: You must accept the terms of service and privacy policy
By continuing with Google, you agree to: By continuing with Google, you agree to our
You are the owner of this family group.
Leaving removes your access to shared me: Leaving removes your access to shared meal diaries, recipes, and shopping lists.
You will lose access to this family's me: You will lose access to this family's meal diaries, recipes, and shopping lists. The shared content stays with the family.
Before you can leave, hand the family ov: Before you can leave, hand the family over to someone else or delete it for everyone.
There are no other members to transfer t: There are no other members to transfer to.
Choose the new owner of this family grou: Choose the new owner of this family group.
This permanently deletes the family grou: This permanently deletes the family group for every member: all meal diaries, recipes, and shopping lists. Members keep their accounts and can create or join another family.
Type the family name to confirm:: Type the family name to confirm:
You are now a regular member and can lea: You are now a regular member and can leave the family whenever you like.
Deleting your account is permanent and c: Deleting your account is permanent and cannot be undone.
Your name on recipes you created (the re: Your name on recipes you created (the recipes stay with your family group)
If you are the only member of your famil: If you are the only member of your family group, all of its meal diaries, recipes, and shopping lists
You are signed in. You can delete your a: You are signed in. You can delete your account below.
In the app: go to Profile and choose Del: In the app: go to Profile and choose Delete account.
Or log in on this site and delete your a: Or log in on this site and delete your account from this page.
If you can no longer sign in, email us f: If you can no longer sign in, email us from the email address on your account and we will delete it for you:
Your account details (name, email, usern: Your account details (name, email, username, avatar) are permanently deleted, along with your analytics data. Meal plans, recipes, and shopping lists shared with a family group may remain with the group, with your name removed. Backups are purged within 30 days.
